caps.proposition_text: The clinician observes pain with range of motion.

evidence.span_text: MSK: Examination of the right wrist: Limited range of movement. Tenderness to palpation. Pain on flexion and extension. Pain with radial deviation and lateral deviation. Pain with wrist abduction and adduction. The metacarpals are intact. Obvious swelling and bruising. Tenderness on palpation throughout. There is evidence of potential fracture feeling and bony crepitus.

caps.proposition_text: The clinician observes evidence of potential fracture.
